name: projax-workspace
description: projax - Cross-platform project management dashboard with CLI and web interface
author: Jose Viscasillas <viscasillas@me.com>

scripts.build: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:cli && pnpm run build:desktop && pnpm run build:prxi && pnpm run build:docsite && pnpm run build:vscode-extension
scripts.test: pnpm run test:api && pnpm run test:cli && pnpm run test:core
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run test:coverage:api && pnpm run test:coverage:cli && pnpm run test:coverage:core
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck --filter projax-core && pnpm run typecheck --filter projax-api && pnpm run typecheck --filter projax && pnpm run typecheck --filter projax-desktop && pnpm run typecheck --filter projax-prxi && pnpm run typecheck --filter projax-vscode
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint --filter projax-core && pnpm run lint --filter projax-api && pnpm run lint --filter projax && pnpm run lint --filter projax-desktop && pnpm run lint --filter projax-prxi && pnpm run lint --filter projax-vscode
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm run lint:fix --filter projax-core && pnpm run lint:fix --filter projax-api && pnpm run lint:fix --filter projax && pnpm run lint:fix --filter projax-desktop && pnpm run lint:fix --filter projax-prxi && pnpm run lint:fix --filter projax-vscode
scripts.postinstall: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:api
scripts.use:local: sudo pnpm uninstall -g projax && sudo pnpm link --global packages/cli && zsh
scripts.use:npm: sudo pnpm uninstall -g projax && sudo pnpm install -g projax && zsh
